title: dianthus brevicaulis
intro: Dianthus brevicaulis, also known as the dwarf pink or short-stemmed pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus brevicaulis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and calming the nervous system. Dianthus brevicaulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
